title: Run a subset of job tasks with their dependencies ​
body:
**June 30, 2026**

When you run a subset of a job's tasks, you can now expand your selection to include each task's dependencies. Add the `+` modifier to a task key to also run its upstream tasks (`+my_task`), its downstream tasks (`my_task+`), or both (`+my_task+`). Start a partial run from the UI, the REST API, the Databricks CLI, the SDKs, or Declarative Automation Bundles. See [Run a subset of tasks and their dependencies](/aws/en/jobs/run-now#run-task-subset).

ref_links.text: Run a subset of tasks and their dependencies
